findings.description: Test sheet column names used as property identifiers are missing from hints: `setUpTable`, `setUpFile`, `expectedTable`, `expectedFile`. These are the primary columns users would query when setting up batch test data.
findings.source_evidence: Source table header: `no  description  expectedStatusCode  setUpTable setUpFile expectedTable  expectedFile  requestPath`

findings.description: Column name `outFile` is missing from hints. This column appears in the testSuccess_fileOutput sheet and is specific to file output batch testing.
findings.source_evidence: Source table header for testSuccess_fileOutputシート: `no  case  expectedStatusCode  setUpTable outFile  requestPath`

findings.description: Column name `expectedFile` is missing from hints. This column appears in the s4 testSuccess sheet (1シートに複数ケース).
findings.source_evidence: Source table header for 1シートに複数ケース: `no  description  expectedStatusCode  setUpTable setUpFile expectedTable  expectedFile  requestPath`
